name: @avatarsd-llc/strawberry-monorepo
description: npm-workspaces monorepo for the Strawberry (Gorshok-v4) grow controller client: the framework-free @avatarsd-llc/strawberry-client library and the @avatarsd-llc/strawberry-cli CLI that consumes it.
author: Avatars LLC

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @avatarsd-llc/strawberry-client && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w @avatarsd-llc/strawberry-client && npm run build -w @avatarsd-llc/strawberry-cli
